steps.title: Identify the opening signal
steps.content: The passage opens with Derksen “combines Indigenous and classical music.” This immediately establishes the passage's focus.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
The correct answer directly captures this purpose—examining how Derksen's compositions blend these traditions. The Orchestral Powwow example demonstrates this through the powwow drum leading instead of a conductor.
  • B wrongly treats it as persuasive advocacy
  • C fabricates production difficulties
  • D shifts to personal background rather than the musical blend
.

That is the correct answer.
